category_sources: source_facts.description: library to communicate with iOS devices natively; official homepage describes a cross-platform C library for iOS devices.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libimobiledevice; official homepage uses the same project name.
docs_sources: Official libimobiledevice site has a Documentation page and API docs; source_facts.repo provides the official GitHub README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states native iOS device communication; source_facts.executables lists idevice utilities.
